Bundle​.entry[17]​.resource​.value​.ofType(boolean) (l1283​/c29)Slicing InformationThis element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Observation-pregnancy-status-uv-ips|2.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) Show Reasoning

Bundle.entry[2] (l442/c6)Slicing InformationThis element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Bundle-uv-ips|2.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) Show Reasoning

 

This element does not match any known slice Defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Bundle-uv-ips|2.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice)
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is Composition) and resource.conformsTo('http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Composition-uv-ips')
    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is Patient) and resource.conformsTo('http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Patient-uv-ips')
    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is AllergyIntolerance) and resource.conformsTo('http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/AllergyIntolerance-uv-ips')
    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is CarePlan)
    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is ClinicalImpression)
    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is Condition) and resource.conformsTo('http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Condition-uv-ips')
    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is Consent)
    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is Device)

    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is DiagnosticReport) and resource.conformsTo('http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/DiagnosticReport-uv-ips')
    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is DocumentReference)
    • ,
  • Bundle.entry[2]: discriminator = true and (resource is Flag) and resource.conformsTo('http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Flag-alert-uv-ips')

Bundle.entry[2] (l445/c6)Slicing InformationThis element does not match any known slice defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/StructureDefinition/Bundle-uv-ips|2.0.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice) Show Reasoning
